governance_note: Advisory pre-alert brief only — Z-PAPAO does not execute actions, crawl the web, or read vault payloads.

alerts.message: Structural health: 0 critical, 2 warning module(s) — inspect z_system_health before heavy deploy.
Communication flow is degraded or needs attention — refresh comms manifests and AAFRTC before high-risk work.
System coherence is misaligned or low — review contradictions in coherence report before promoting changes.
Consistency alerts present — resolve or consciously accept before large refactors.
Activity signal is low — outcomes and learning layers may be underfed.
Adaptive coherence predicts elevated risk — follow top recommended actions in that report.

precautions.text: Do not automate or bypass Cursor approval UIs (Allowlist, Run, Approve terminal) — use tasks, dashboards, and slash rituals per hub boundary.
When unsure about authority or repo ownership, read Hierarchy Chief before cross-project edits.
Run npm run ecosystem:status-emit after registry edits to refresh on-disk path visibility.
Run Phase COMMS from Z-NEXT roadmap: comms:github-ai, comms:cloudflare-ai, z_aafrtc_resolve.mjs.
Prefer Playbook A (FEED) and a fresh garage scan after adding real learning events.

meta.visual_boundary_title: Visual automation and Cursor approval boundaries (14 DRP aligned)
